key_highlights: Fed minutes reveal more officials warned of possible rate hike, signaling hawkish shift
SpaceX files for IPO on Nasdaq under SPCX, revealing $4.69B Q1 revenue
Oil prices fall sharply on US-Iran deal hopes, boosting stocks and bonds
Nvidia earnings beat estimates but draw lukewarm investor reaction, chip sector under pressure
NextEra to buy Dominion for $67B, forming a power giant in the utility sector
AI disruption concerns spread across sectors, from First Advantage to Cerebras IPO
US 30-year yield hits highest since 2007, deepening bond selloff
Gold faces downside risk below 200-DMA, Societe Generale warns
Emerging currencies gain as Iran war fears ease
Private credit valuations under DOJ probe, BlackRock fund in focus

sectors.trend: Mixed: AI-driven stocks like Nvidia beat estimates but face lukewarm reaction; chip sector (Micron, Sandisk) in meltdown; Cerebras IPO surges but analysts say not a buy; Meta considered cheap off highs; Dell bullish on AI boom; ServiceNow erases gains as software rebound cools.
sectors.implications: AI optimism is being tempered by valuation concerns and profit-taking. The sector is bifurcated between high-growth AI plays and legacy tech under pressure. Investors should focus on companies with strong AI revenue visibility and reasonable valuations.

sectors.trend: Oil prices fall sharply on US-Iran deal hopes; Shell price target lowered despite Q1 beat; Energy Transfer target raised; Oil & gas M&A heats up with $20B assets in play; Berkshire trims Chevron stake; rising gas prices hamper summer travel.
sectors.implications: Geopolitical risk premium is fading, pressuring oil prices. M&A activity suggests consolidation, but lower prices could hurt earnings. Investors should monitor Iran deal progress and OPEC+ response.

sectors.trend: Goldman Sachs selected to lead SpaceX IPO; JP Morgan raises price targets on Target and Edison International; HSBC among top undervalued dividend stocks; IG Group shares hit all-time high; low dollar volatility forces FX traders into carry trades.
sectors.implications: Investment banking activity is picking up with major IPOs, benefiting banks like Goldman. Dividend stocks remain attractive in a volatile rate environment. FX markets are shifting toward carry strategies.

sectors.trend: NextEra to buy Dominion for $67B to form power giant; Exelon price target lowered despite strong Q1; Edison International gets second PT raise from JP Morgan; Germany seeks 40% stake in tank-maker KNDS.
sectors.implications: Utility mega-merger signals consolidation for scale and renewable energy investment. Regulatory and rate environment remain key. Defense infrastructure spending in Europe is rising.

sectors.trend: Target names new supply-chain head amid weak sales; Wayfair profitability expands despite muted backdrop; Carvana seen as strong long-term hold; consumers cracking under high prices; Barnes & Noble open to AI-written books.
sectors.implications: Consumer discretionary is under pressure from inflation and high rates. Companies with cost discipline and supply-chain improvements (Target, Wayfair) may outperform. AI is reshaping retail content.

sectors.trend: AbbVie price target lowered to $235 at Evercore ISI.
sectors.implications: Pharma faces patent cliff and pricing pressure. AbbVie's Humira erosion continues. Focus on pipeline and M&A for growth.

sectors.trend: ICTSI secures $300M loan from AIIB for port infrastructure; Germany coalition pursues 40% stake in KNDS.
sectors.implications: Infrastructure investment continues globally, with Asia and Europe leading. Port and defense infrastructure are key themes.

key_themes: Fed hawkishness and rate hike risks dominate macro outlook
AI disruption is both an opportunity and a risk across sectors
Geopolitical tensions (US-Iran, US-China, EU trade) drive volatility
Bond yields surge, pressuring equities and gold
IPO market revival with SpaceX, Cerebras, OpenAI filings
Energy transition and utility consolidation accelerate
Consumer weakness amid high prices and rising rates
Private credit and alternative asset valuations under regulatory scrutiny
Currency markets shift as dollar volatility drops
Cybersecurity risks exposed by CISA data leak

risk_assessment.mitigation: Reduce duration in bond portfolios; favor floating-rate debt; increase cash allocation; hedge with rate futures or options.
Diversify across AI beneficiaries and value sectors; avoid overvalued AI hype stocks; focus on companies with real AI revenue.
Increase exposure to safe-haven assets (gold, Treasuries on dips); hedge oil exposure; monitor diplomatic developments.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Bond yield surge and equity repricing
risk_assessment.mitigation: Reduce equity exposure in rate-sensitive sectors (utilities, REITs); favor short-duration bonds; consider TIPS for inflation protection.
Underweight consumer discretionary; overweight consumer staples and discount retailers; monitor retail earnings and consumer confidence.
Reduce exposure to private credit funds; favor public credit with transparency; monitor DOJ probe outcomes.
Invest in cybersecurity stocks; ensure portfolio companies have robust data protection; monitor regulatory developments.
Hedge EM currency exposure; focus on countries with strong fundamentals; monitor Fed policy and commodity prices.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy SpaceX IPO on allocation, but wait for post-IPO volatility to subside before adding
opportunities.rationale: SpaceX's $4.69B Q1 revenue and dominant position in space and Starlink make it a rare growth opportunity. IPO likely to be oversubscribed; initial pop may be followed by profit-taking.
Meta is off highs and considered cheap relative to AI peers. Strong ad revenue and AI investments support long-term growth.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy Dell Technologies on AI server demand
opportunities.rationale: AI boom is likely to keep pushing DELL stock higher as enterprise AI adoption drives server and storage upgrades.
NextEra's $67B acquisition of Dominion creates a utility giant with scale in renewables. Long-term regulated cash flows and clean energy tailwinds.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy Target on weakness with new supply-chain head
opportunities.rationale: Target's new supply-chain leadership could improve margins. JP Morgan raised price target. Weak sales are priced in; turnaround potential.

opportunities.recommendation: Consider carry trades in emerging currencies
opportunities.rationale: Low dollar volatility and Iran deal hopes support EM currencies. Focus on high-yield currencies with stable fundamentals.

defensive_moves.rationale: Fed rate hike risk and rising yields make cash attractive. Short-duration bonds reduce duration risk while providing income.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Hedge equity portfolios with put options on QQQ or SPY
defensive_moves.rationale: Tech sector pressure and rising yields increase downside risk. Puts provide insurance against a correction.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to overvalued AI and semiconductor stocks
defensive_moves.rationale: Nvidia's lukewarm reaction and chip sector meltdown suggest profit-taking. Rotate to value and dividend stocks.
Gold downside risk is limited by geopolitical tensions and Fed uncertainty. Societe Generale sees support near 200-DMA; buy on weakness.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Increase allocation to consumer staples and dividend aristocrats
defensive_moves.rationale: Consumer weakness and rate uncertainty favor defensive sectors. Altria, Verizon, and HSBC offer high dividends and stability.

market_outlook.short_term: 1-3 month outlook: Cautious with downside risks. Fed rate hike talk, rising bond yields, and tech sector pressure will weigh on equities. Oil price decline and Iran deal hopes provide some relief. Expect continued volatility with a bias toward defensive positioning. Key levels: S&P 500 support at 5,000, resistance at 5,300.
market_outlook.long_term: 6-12 month outlook: Moderately positive if Fed pauses and AI investment cycle continues. SpaceX IPO, OpenAI IPO, and utility mega-merger signal long-term growth. However, inflation persistence and geopolitical risks (US-China, EU trade) could derail recovery. Earnings growth and AI adoption are key drivers. Target S&P 500 year-end 5,500.

US-Iran nuclear deal progress and oil price response

US consumer spending and inflation data (PCE, CPI)
China stimulus and 'China Shock 2.0' impact on global trade

Germany defense spending and KNDS stake
Emerging market currency trends and carry trade flows
watch_list: Fed funds futures and rate hike probability
WTI and Brent crude oil prices
Bitcoin price and MicroStrategy buying activity
Dollar index (DXY) and EM currency performance
Nvidia, Meta, Dell, and Target earnings revisions
SpaceX and OpenAI IPO filings and roadshow
Cerebras stock price and index inclusion
BlackRock private credit fund valuation updates
EU trade deal timeline with US
Ghana cedi and external debt dynamics
